description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen television with a large, rectangular display and a slim profile. The front features a wide, black screen bordered by a thin, matte bezel, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The back panel is slightly recessed and includes ventilation grilles, mounting points, and a cluster of input/output ports on one side. The television stands on a sturdy, rectangular base that provides stability. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metal reinforcement, and the screen itself is likely made of glass or a similar transparent material. The design is minimalist, with all functional elements such as buttons and ports discreetly placed on the rear panel.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen television with a thin black bezel, large display, and a sturdy rectangular base. Ports and controls are located on the back panel.
description_view_0: The front view shows a wide, black screen with a thin bezel and a central stand, emphasizing the display area.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the television's ultra-slim profile and the depth of the rear panel.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the recessed back panel, ventilation grilles, mounting points, and a cluster of ports and controls on one side.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again emphasizes the slimness of the television and the slight protrusion of the back panel.
attribute_bezel_design: thin, matte black bezel with minimal styling
attribute_control_button_layout: cluster on back panel, lower right
